mapper.sql:
a.id,
a.app_id,
a.name,
a.owner_user_id,
a.remark,
a.is_deleted,
a.status,
u.real_name AS owner_real_name
mapper.select:
select
from apps a
left join users u on a.owner_user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0
where a.is_deleted = 0
order by a.id desc

select
from apps a
left join users u on a.owner_user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0
where a.id = #{id} and a.is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from apps where app_id = #{appId}
mapper.insert:
insert into apps(app_id, name, owner_user_id, remark, status, is_deleted)
values(#{appId}, #{name}, #{ownerUserId}, #{remark}, 'ENABLED', 0)
mapper.update:
update apps
set name = #{name},
owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId},
remark = #{remark}
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

update apps
set is_deleted = 1,
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(1) from app_credentials where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from app_model_permissions where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from billing_statements where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from gateway_requests where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from gateway_requests where app_id = #{appId} and status = 'SUCCESS'
select coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) from gateway_requests where app_id = #{appId}
